title: K-200 Comms/Datalink Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Comms/Datalink Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-436-D. Revision: D. Type: procedure. Author: Felix Herrera. Created: 2025-01-11. Last modified: 2025-04-18. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Comms/Datalink subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1019, P-1059, P-1099, P-1023.
